name: pre-mortem
description: Multi-agent project pre-mortem — parallel agents with different failure-finding mandates, synthesized into ranked risks with mitigations.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent project pre-mortem — parallel agents with different failure-finding mandates, synthesized into ranked risks with mitigations.
interface.longDescription: Multi-agent project pre-mortem — parallel agents with different failure-finding mandates, synthesized into ranked risks with mitigations. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Run a sharp pre-mortem on this project or launch. Surface specific failure modes, then rank them and propose mitigations.
